THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, SAU YIN WONG, YIU LU SUED AS LUN, YIU $14,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,000.00, DFTS TO PAY PLTF THE SUM OF $14,000 BY 5PM ON 5-9-97. IF PAID TIMELY, PLTF WILL DELIVER TITLE TO DEFTS' COUNSEL OF 1991 MERCEDES 300E. CROSS-DEFT EUROPEAN MOTORS TO PAY PLTF FHE SUM OF $5000 ONCE DEFTS HAVE PAID PLTF. IF DEFTS PMNT TO PLTF NOT TIMELY MADE,PLTF MAY SEEK WRIT/AMD JUDGMT.SEE JUDMT
